recommendations.title: Wildling
recommendations.overview: A young woman held in captivity discovers the realities of truth and lies in the outside world.

recommendations.title: Hidden
recommendations.overview: A family takes refuge in a fallout shelter to avoid a dangerous outbreak.

recommendations.title: The House at the End of Time
recommendations.overview: The story of Dulce, a mother who has encounters with apparitions inside her old house. She must decipher a mystery that could trigger a prophecy: the death of her family.

recommendations.title: Under the Stars of Paris
recommendations.overview: Christine’s life has not been easy lately. Her lonely routine is divided between free food banks distributions and wandering the streets. On a cold winter night she founds Suli, an 8-year-old Eritrean boy, sobbing in front of her shelter. Christine u

recommendations.title: Beanpole
recommendations.overview: 1945, Leningrad. World War II has devastated the city, demolishing its buildings and leaving its citizens in tatters, physically and mentally. Two young women, Iya and Masha, search for meaning and hope in the struggle to rebuild their lives amongst

recommendations.title: November
recommendations.overview: In a poor Estonian village, a group of peasants use magic and folk remedies to survive the winter, and a young woman tries to get a young man to love her.

recommendations.title: Apocalypse Z: The Beginning of the End
recommendations.overview: When a kind of rabies that transforms people into aggressive creatures spreads across the planet, Manel isolates himself at home with his cat, relying on his wits to survive; but soon they must go out in search of food, by land and by sea, dodging ma

recommendations.title: The Telephone Box
recommendations.overview: A man gets trapped inside a telephone box and nobody is able to free him.

recommendations.title: Alone
recommendations.overview: When an outbreak hits, Aidan barricades himself inside his apartment and starts rationing food. His complex is overrun by infected Screamers, and with the world falling apart into chaos, he is left completely alone fighting for his life.

recommendations.title: Doraemon: Nobita's Great Adventure in the Antarctic Kachi Kochi
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, Science Fiction, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Doraemon and Nobita discover a mysterious golden ring far beneath the ice in Antarctica, leading them to uncover an ancient, ruined city.
